name: Chocolate Amaretto Cheesecake (Sealing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Sprinkle chocolate wafers in the bottom of a 7-inch springform pan.
2. In a food processor, combine cream cheese and the next seven ingredients. Process until smooth.
3. Add the egg and process just until well blended.
4. Fold in chocolate morsels.
5. Slowly pour the mixture over the crumbs in the pan.
6. Bake at 300°F for 65-75 minutes or until the cheesecake is set.
7. Let cool in the pan on a wire rack.
8. Cover and chill for at least 8 hours.
9. Remove sides of the springform pan and transfer to a serving plate. Garnish with chocolate curls.
